last_reflection: Been at it all day on the tasking rewrite. The board works now, proper state machine, not the half-thing I had before. Still got the nightly review hook unconnected, that's tomorrow. And Cole, the old board wasn't as broken as I keep pretending it was. Mostly it worked fine. That's one of mine — I'll say "it was terrible" because then today looks better by comparison. It was just okay. Today is actually better. Don't confuse a real upgrade with making the past look worse.
